name: kafka-connect-contractgate
title: ContractGate Semantic Validator
description: Real-time semantic contract enforcement for Kafka Connect. Validates every record against a ContractGate contract before it reaches storage or AI systems. Invalid records are routed to a dead-letter topic; passing records continue downstream unchanged. Supports DLQ routing, tag-and-pass, per-field violation headers, dry-run mode, and contract version pinning.
